meta_title: Online Store Website — Create in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create an online store website with product catalog, cart, and payment. No code, fast, professional. Try free on Promto.
og_description: Professional online store with catalog, cart, and online payment. Create in 5 minutes without code on Promto.
hero_subtitle: Launch a full-featured online store in 5 minutes and start receiving orders today.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Launch in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe your store — AI will create the catalog, product cards, and checkout page.

advantages.title: Catalog and Product Cards
advantages.description: Photos, descriptions, prices, variants, and stock — everything needed to sell products online.

advantages.title: Online Payment
advantages.description: Accept card payments, QR payments (SBP), and popular payment systems directly on the site.

advantages.title: Store SEO
advantages.description: Product cards and categories optimized for search — customers will find you on Google and Yandex.

advantages.title: Customer Security
advantages.description: SSL certificate, data protection, and reliable payment processing included by default.

advantages.title: Order Management
advantages.description: All orders in one place: statuses, history, notifications to customers and managers.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Store and Products
how_it_works.description: Specify categories, price range, and description — AI will create the store structure.

how_it_works.title: Upload Products
how_it_works.description: Add photos and product descriptions through the editor or upload via Excel spreadsheet.

how_it_works.title: Connect Payment and Launch
how_it_works.description: Set up the payment system and delivery — your store is ready to accept orders.

faq.question: Can I add a large product catalog?
faq.answer: Yes, the number of products depends on the plan. Unlimited catalog on paid plans.

faq.question: What payment methods are supported?
faq.answer: Bank cards, QR payments (SBP), Yookassa, Stripe, and other popular payment systems.

faq.question: How do I set up delivery and its cost?
faq.answer: Set delivery zones and rates: free above a certain amount, fixed, or calculated.

faq.question: Is there a mobile version of the store?
faq.answer: Yes, all Promto sites are mobile-responsive — most purchases happen from smartphones.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create an online store on Promto?
faq.answer: Start for free. Paid plans unlock unlimited catalog, analytics, and custom domain.

faq.question: Are technical skills required?
faq.answer: No. Promto creates a store completely code-free — just describe, and AI does the work.

cta_mid_subtitle: First orders can come in on the very day your store opens.
cta_final_subtitle: Create an online store website for free and start selling online.
